form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 4th of 9 at this track on March 4 over 1200m, in the wet; 3 len behind Explode with 58.5kg at $11.50. Second run from a spell came home strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 13 at Ashburton on April 2 over 1200m, slow going 1.5 len behind Hard Attack with 58.5kg at $5.90. Poised to break through.

The run before that 3rd of 14 at Ashburton on March 12 over 1200m, 3 len behind Novelette carrying 58.5kg at $19.40. One of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign 12th of 14 at Phar Lap Racecourse September 24 over 1600m, soft track; 16 len behind Tetbury carrying 55.5kg at $55.80. On debut sixth of 9 at Riccarton Park Synthetic September 11 over 1400m, 9 len behind Le Rogier carrying 58.5kg at $24.20. Sure to have improved over the break so he can feature.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 52 day let-up. First-up sat on the pace before fading 8th of 11 at this track on January 24 over 1400m, on heavy track; 12 len behind Quintain with 58.5kg at $34.70. Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 11 at this track on February 18 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 11 len behind The Arctic Monkey with 58.5kg at $35.30. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding (Too Darn Hot - Magic Harmony) has trialled on nine occasions leading into today's race. Seventh at Tauranga in a 1200m trial on February 24. Hard to recommend without a market push.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At very big odds at debut, raced on the pace before fading 11th of 14 at this track on March 4 over 1400m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Lady Maxima with 58.5kg at $91.30. Second-up ran last of 14 at Ashburton on April 2 over 1400m, slow going 20 len behind Graffiti Artist carrying 58.5kg at $62.70. Can't see him breaking through for the maiden win this time.

form.formComment: Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last start 5th of 9 at this track on March 4 over 1200m, on a wet track; 3.5 len behind Explode with 57kg at $4.30. The start before that ran on from midfield; 3rd of 15 at Wingatui on February 7 over 1400m, slow going 1.5 len behind The Ocean Heart carrying 58kg at $15.10. Best form stacks up nicely and deserves another chance.
